basic_details.job_title: ICAR NBPGR Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR-National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources (ICAR NBPGR) Young Professional-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.nbpgr.icar.gov.in. A total of 1 Young Professional-I vacancy has been announced through the ICAR NBPGR Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/female candidates, up to 10 years for Differently Abled candidates and 3 years for OBC (non-creamy layer)

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Computer/ Administration / Management (with minimum 60% marks)
qualification.details: Graduate in Computer/ Administration / Management (with minimum 60% marks) from a recognized University/ College. Desirable: Minimum two years' experience of working in Plant Genetic Resources management aspects /Practical knowledge and experience of IT application, virtual meeting platforms and computer skills (MS Word, Excel, Power Point, etc.).

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ICAR NBPGR Young Professional-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR NBPGR Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.icar_national_bureau_of_plant_genetic_re: Graduate in Computer/ Administration / Management (with minimum 60% marks)

content_sections.heading: ICAR NBPGR Young Professional-I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ICAR NBPGR Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ICAR NBPGR Young Professional-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR NBPGR Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
ICAR NBPGR Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Graduate in Computer/ Administration / Management (with minimum 60% marks) from a recognized University/ College. Desirable: Minimum two years' experience of working in Plant Genetic Resources management aspects /Practical knowledge and experience of IT application, virtual meeting platforms and computer skills (MS Word, Excel, Power Point, etc.).

content_sections.heading: ICAR NBPGR Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/female candidates, up to 10 years for Differently Abled candidates and 3 years for OBC (non-creamy layer)

content_sections.heading: ICAR NBPGR Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
ICAR NBPGR Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
ICAR NBPGR Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR NBPGR Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICAR NBPGR Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the ICAR NBPGR recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the ICAR NBPGR recruitment is Young Professional-I.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional-I post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR NBPGR Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: The last date for the Walk-in Interview is 20 July 2026. There is no separate application submission deadline mentioned.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to be a Graduate in Computer/ Administration / Management with a minimum of 60% marks from a recognized University/ College.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: The age limit is between 21 years and 45 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the ICAR NBPGR Young Professional-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Walk-in Interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at the ICAR NBPGR office in New Delhi, Delhi, with pincode 110012.
